docs.text: Builds ¶ A player in WvW is only as good as his build will allow him to be. It is important to select a build that fits your team composition properly. See below for our recommended builds, sorted into primary categories based primary class. Guardian Builds ¶ Condi Guardian Powerful ranged damage dealer with good boon application and strong damage mitigation Visit Build Power Dragonhunter Excellent burst damage as well as long-fight damage while providing top-class boon corruption to the enemy Visit Build Power Guardian Arguably the best healing for the team, with excellent utility with strong stealth, cleanse, and barrier to buff allies Visit Build Support Firebrand Excellent utility and support, one of the stronger healers and most useful utility classes for a group Visit Build Revenant Builds ¶ Condi Renegade Powerful ranged damage dealer with good boon application and strong damage mitigation Visit Build Power Herald Powerful ranged damage dealer with good boon application and strong damage mitigation Visit Build Power Renegade Powerful ranged damage dealer with good boon application and strong damage mitigation Visit Build Power Revenant Powerful ranged damage dealer with good boon application and strong damage mitigation Visit Build Power Vindicator Powerful ranged damage dealer with good boon application and strong damage mitigation Visit Build More Builds ¶ Dummy Build Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. docs.title: Condi Firebrand

docs.text: The Power Dragonhunter is an easy and rewarding build to play in WvW due to its strong damage potential and decent sustainability. It provides a good mix of strong consistent damage output with heavy burst capabilities. The Power Dragonhunter provides a moderate amount of support utility through its virtues, and can be used as a second source of stability for its party. Build ¶ Warning: file_to_include.html could not be included.
docs.title: Power Dragonhunter

docs.text: Warning: file_to_include.html could not be included.
docs.title: Build

docs.text: The Power Guardian is an easy and rewarding build to play in WvW due to its strong damage potential and it's decent sustainability. The Power Guardian provides high sustained damage output while providing a moderate amount of support utility through its virtues. Like other Guardian builds, the Power Guardian can be used as a second source of stability for its party. Gear ¶ Template Code [&DQkOHQMuPzrcEQAABhIAACsSAADUEQAAyhEAAAQFAAArEgYS1BEAAAAAAAA=] Optimal Gear Gear Alternatives This armor and stat selection gives the most optimized selection of gear to maximizing DPS while still meeting a 20k HP threshold. Head Shoulders Chest Hands Legs Feet Dragon Dragon Dragon Dragon Dragon Dragon Back Accessory Accessory Ring Ring Amulet Dragon Dragon Dragon Dragon Dragon Dragon A combination of the following affixes can be used in place of the Optimal Gear selection from the previous tab. These are displayed in order of best DPS/health per stat point. Affix Description DPS Full Dragon Armor Full Dragon Trinkets 57464.43 Full Marauder Armor Full Marauder Trinkets 57464.43 Full Valkyrie Armor Full Berserker Trinkets 57464.43 Use the Discretize Gear Optimizer for optimizing your gear selection based on what works best for you while keeping the most optimal damage output. Tip Why do I not use Scholar Runes? Runes of the Scholar do not allow for a 20k health benchmark to be made unless a complex mix and match of gear stats is made, which actually is lower in offensive stats than Dragon's gear with Divinity Runes. Additionally, Scholar Runes are conditional on a 90% health benchmark, which is challenging to maintain in WvW. Skills ¶ Tactics ¶ Media ¶ Notes ¶
docs.title: Power Guardian

Head Shoulders Chest Hands Legs Feet Dragon Dragon Dragon Dragon Dragon Dragon Back Accessory Accessory Ring Ring Amulet Dragon Dragon Dragon Dragon Dragon Dragon A combination of the following affixes can be used in place of the Optimal Gear selection from the previous tab. These are displayed in order of best DPS/health per stat point. Affix Description DPS Full Dragon Armor Full Dragon Trinkets 57464.43 Full Marauder Armor Full Marauder Trinkets 57464.43 Full Valkyrie Armor Full Berserker Trinkets 57464.43 Use the Discretize Gear Optimizer for optimizing your gear selection based on what works best for you while keeping the most optimal damage output. Tip Why do I not use Scholar Runes? Runes of the Scholar do not allow for a 20k health benchmark to be made unless a complex mix and match of gear stats is made, which actually is lower in offensive stats than Dragon's gear with Divinity Runes. Additionally, Scholar Runes are conditional on a 90% health benchmark, which is challenging to maintain in WvW.
